content:
# Heterogeneity

**Summary**: The variation in physical properties or characteristics of a rock body.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-el-deek|El-Deek, 2014]] evaluated the multi-scale heterogeneity (micro, meso, macro) to predict reservoir quality.

- [[2024-alabdrabalnabi|Alabdrabalnabi, 2024]] analyzed the impact of heterogeneity on gel distribution and temperature profiles in 3D models.

## Scientific Context

- [[2014-el-deek|El-Deek, 2014]] Used to quantify the impact of geological complexity on reservoir quality.

- [[2024-alabdrabalnabi|Alabdrabalnabi, 2024]] analyzed the impact of heterogeneity on gel distribution and temperature profiles in 3D models.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2014-el-deek|El-Deek, 2014]] quantified using coefficient of variation, Dykstra-parsons, and Lorenz coefficients.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Sarah Formation can be considered to represent heterogeneous to very heterogeneous reservoir. ([[2014-el-deek|El-Deek, 2014, p. 16]])


- High-permeability thief zones cause preferential flow, while low-permeability layers can impede gel entry. ([[2024-alabdrabalnabi|Alabdrabalnabi, 2024, p. 104]])
